mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_emotion_real_state (id, user_id, like_value, activity_value, familiarity, is_valid) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{likeValue}, #{activityValue}, #{familiarity}, #{isValid})
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_emotion_real_state SET
like_value = #{likeValue}, activity_value = #{activityValue}, familiarity = #{familiarity},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE ai_emotion_real_state SET is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, like_value, activity_value, familiarity, create_time, update_time, is_valid, is_deleted FROM ai_emotion_real_state WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, user_id, like_value, activity_value, familiarity, create_time, update_time, is_valid, is_deleted FROM ai_emotion_real_state WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT user_id FROM ai_emotion_real_state WHERE activity_value = 100 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT user_id FROM ai_emotion_real_state WHERE like_value > #{likeThreshold} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, like_value, activity_value, familiarity, create_time, update_time FROM ai_emotion_real_state WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_valid = 1
